General.Name: YesAsia Holdings Ltd
General.Description: YesAsia Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in trading of Asian fashion and lifestyle, beauty, cosmetics, accessories, and entertainment products. It also provides logistic, warehouse, and ancillary services. In addition, the company involved in business-to-business and business-to-consumer and e-commerce sales through yesasia.com; yesstyle.com; and asianbeautywholesale.com websites. The company operates in the United States, European Union countries, the United Kingdom, Canada, Hong Kong, Australia, the United Arab Emirates, Mexico, and internationally. YesAsia Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
General.Address: KC100, 100 Kwai Cheong Road, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
